subject: [PATCH v3 12/20] block: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for block devices to use a new callback function, ->iomap_next(), which is generated by the DEFINE_IOMAP_ITER_NEXT() macro. This change does not introduce any functional changes and is part of a larger series of patches. The new callback is used to finish previous mappings if necessary and produce the next one.

reviews.author: Christoph Hellwig
reviews.summary: The patch looks good and Christoph is willing to give it a Reviewed-by tag.

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch converts the block iomap operations to use a new callback, ->iomap_next(), which is generated by the DEFINE_IOMAP_ITER_NEXT() macro. The callback wraps the iomap_iter_next() helper to finish previous mappings and produce next ones. This change does not introduce any functional changes.
